$schema: study-abroad-planner v0.3.0 7-school OT PR pathway comparison
schema_note: Compares PR pathway structural advantages across 7 Australian OT schools. The actual 'PR grant rate' by school is NOT publicly tracked — AHPRA does not publish school-of-graduation, and universities don't publish PR grant rates. This analysis uses PROXY signals: (1) QILT full-time employment rate, (2) regional location for 491 bonus, (3) state nomination availability, (4) AHPRA workforce density by state. Best-effort estimates with explicit confidence levels. Treat as directional, not exact.

schools.state_nomination_190_difficulty: ★★ 实际标准: NT 2025-26 配额已用完 + NT Graduate Stream 路径需 2y CDU 居住 + 6 月 485 visa 期居住 + 工作努力证明 + 3y 居住承诺(来源: australiasnorthernterritory.com.au 2026-01-26 更新). '池子小=易担保'是代理信号,真实门槛已严格.
schools.state_nomination_491_difficulty: ★★ 实际标准: 同 NT Graduate Stream (2y CDU 居住) + 6 月 491 居住承诺(短于 190). 491 路径略宽松(政府报告 26/11/2025 NTOMOL 包含 252411 OT).
schools.v0_3_0_real_world_constraint: ★★ NT 2025-26 提名门户已于 2026-01-26 关闭 (配额用完). 新申请只接受 NT Graduate / NT Resident 流. CDU 优势 = NT Graduate Stream 资格, 不是 '小池子'.
schools.practical_supervision_after_grad: Low — strong NT job market, willing employers
schools.estimated_pr_conversion_basis: 偏远 + NT 最小 OT 池子(256) + 96.4% QILT FT 就业 + 最低学费($34,736/yr) + CDU OT 27 Oct 2025 后直接走 Pathway A 简化注册. 注: 真实 PR grant-by-school 数据不公开, 此为结构性 best-effort.
key_advantages: Highest QILT FT employment (96.4%) — best graduate outcome signal
★ NT Graduate Stream eligibility: 2y CDU 居住 + 6 月 485 居住 + 工作努力证明 = NT 190/491 提名核心路径 (2026-01-26 NT 配额已用完, 但 CDU 毕业生走 Graduate Stream 仍可申请)
Pathway A streamlined (post 27 Oct 2025) — 3-6 months to General Registration
No PTE/English upgrade needed (65/58 entry sufficient)
key_disadvantages: Darwin is geographically remote (low lifestyle amenities)
Smaller university brand recognition vs Group of 8
Limited peer network in Darwin OT community

schools.state_nomination_190_difficulty: Low — Tasmania actively nominates health professionals
schools.practical_supervision_after_grad: Medium — TAS OT market smaller, but growing
schools.estimated_pr_conversion_basis: Regional + TAS 491 path mature + 89.0% QILT FT employment. Constraint: PTE 65 each entry requirement excludes applicants who only meet the lower AHPRA ELS bar of 65/58. TAS state nomination real criteria pending tier_2 verification. Note: real grant-by-school data is not publicly published.
key_advantages: Tasmania 491 is a well-trodden PR path (5+ points regional bonus)
PTE 65 each required — applicants with only the lower AHPRA ELS 65/58 bar need an upgrade
TAS state government actively recruits OTs for regional health services
key_disadvantages: Higher tuition ($50,687/yr)
PTE each 65 entry requirement (user has 58)
IELTS only — no PTE accepted (verify)
Smaller OT workforce in TAS (447 total)

schools.estimated_pr_conversion_basis: 偏远(VIC Bendigo) + 88.0% QILT FT 就业 + VIC 大市场 8,809 OT. 局限: PTE each 65 门槛 + VIC 190 竞争激烈(墨尔本). 注: 真实 grant-by-school 数据不公开.
key_advantages: VIC regional bonus (Bendigo classified regional for 491)
PTE 65 each required (user has 58 — needs upgrade)
key_disadvantages: PTE each 65 entry requirement
VIC OT market is large (8,809) — more competition for state nomination
No QILT data showing higher than 88% FT employment

schools.estimated_pr_conversion_basis: SA 190 可行 + 92.0% QILT FT 就业. 局限: ❌ Adelaide 非偏远(无 491 加分) + IELTS 7.0/6.5(不接 PTE). 注: 真实 grant-by-school 数据不公开.
key_disadvantages: Adelaide is NOT regional — no 491 bonus
Higher tuition ($49,700/yr)
IELTS only (not PTE) — user needs IELTS, not PTE
More expensive than CDU by $30K total

schools.estimated_pr_conversion_basis: 学费比 Flinders 便宜($42K vs $49.7K) + 90.0% QILT FT 就业 + SA 190. 局限: ❌ Adelaide 非偏远 + PTE each 65 门槛 + 与 Flinders 直接竞争 SA 池. 注: 真实 grant-by-school 数据不公开.
key_disadvantages: Adelaide NOT regional
PTE 65 each required (user has 58)
Same SA pool as Flinders — direct competition

schools.practical_supervision_after_grad: Very high — best VIC job market
schools.estimated_pr_conversion_basis: Top brand + 92.0% QILT + large VIC market. Constraint: ❌❌ PTE 79 each entry requirement is well above the AHPRA ELS bar — most applicants are excluded. Plus highest tuition ($56K) + Melbourne not regional + VIC 190 extremely competitive. Note: real grant-by-school data is not publicly published.
key_disadvantages: ❌ PTE 79 each required (user has 58 — major gap)
Highest tuition ($56K/yr)
Melbourne NOT regional
VIC 190 extremely competitive
Worst PR conversion: $112K for likely 189-only path

schools.state_nomination_190_difficulty: Very hard — NSW 190 capped, extremely competitive
schools.estimated_pr_conversion_basis: Top brand + 9,154 OTs (largest pool). Constraint: ❌❌ PTE 79 each entry requirement is well above the AHPRA ELS bar — most applicants are excluded. Plus highest tuition ($58K) + Sydney not regional + NSW 190 extremely competitive and capped. Note: real grant-by-school data is not publicly published.
key_disadvantages: ❌ PTE 79 each required (user has 58 — major gap)
Highest tuition ($58K/yr)
Sydney NOT regional
NSW 190 extremely competitive + capped
Worst PR conversion: $116K for uncertain outcome

methodology_note_v0_3_0: v0.3.0: 'estimated_pr_conversion_5yr_pct' (precise %) replaced with 'estimated_pr_conversion_5yr_tier' (高/中/低) + 'estimated_pr_conversion_confidence' + 'estimated_pr_conversion_basis' (signals used). This removes false precision — AHPRA does not publish PR grant-by-school, so 85% would be fabricated. The underlying signals remain: (1) QILT FT employment; (2) regional bonus eligibility; (3) state nomination availability; (4) AHPRA workforce density by state. tier is best-effort directional and MUST be cross-verified with current data (use source-validator.mjs). Major decisions (school choice) should also verify state nomination criteria at tier_2 (state government pages), not rely solely on these tier signals.

headline_ranking_summary.avoid_for_pr: UniMelb / USyd — PTE 79 barrier + no regional + highest cost
headline_ranking_summary.key_insight: Regional schools give +5-10 EOI points over metro schools. In OT (75-80 cutoff), +5 points = likely vs borderline. The 30-50% cost savings of regional schools further compounds.

data_sources.name: DoH Workforce Data — Allied Health
data_sources.use: OTs per 100k by state (NT 73.5, TAS 73.5, VIC 137.2, SA 123.8, WA 109.5, NSW 93.7, QLD 109.0, ACT 93.8)

data_sources.name: Skills Priority List 2025
data_sources.use: OT in shortage in all 8 states/territories
